hypothesis: In NN-BAX, replacing random sampling along the predicted NEB path with an uncertainty-aware acquisition that selects at each iteration the image with maximal ensemble variance in the perpendicular force will reduce the number of simulator evaluations needed to achieve concurrent convergence (fmax ≤ t and MAEi ≤ m) by at least 50% without increasing the median energy-barrier error beyond 0.05 eV on multi-minima transitions such as LJ38 and analogous DFT reaction pathways.
